summary: Comprehensive testing of SnapRoad Driver App completed. Backend: 37/38 API tests passed (97%). Frontend: All 5 main tabs working (Map, Offers, Routes, Engage, Profile). Fixed widget positioning issue and button nesting HTML error.

minor.issue: Root endpoint returns HTML (frontend) instead of JSON - expected behavior for SPA

fixed_issues.issue: Widgets were positioned at y=130 which overlapped with location panel (z-index 10), making collapse buttons unclickable
fixed_issues.fix: Changed widget initial position from y=130 to y=290 and added z-index:5 to widgets

fixed_issues.issue: Invalid HTML: button element nested inside button element (favorite button inside offer card button)
fixed_issues.fix: Changed outer button to div with cursor-pointer class

critical_code_review_comments: React Router future flag warnings present - consider adding v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath flags
Vite CJS deprecation warning - consider updating to ESM build
test_credentials: No authentication required for driver app
seed_data_creation: Backend uses in-memory mock data - no database seeding needed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working. Backend has 25+ API endpoints all functional. Frontend has 5 main tabs (Map, Offers, Routes, Engage, Profile) with sub-tabs. Widgets are draggable and collapsible. All buttons have data-testid attributes. MOCKED: All data is from in-memory mock data on backend - no external services integrated.
mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory mock data for users, locations, routes, offers, badges, skins, and family members. No external services or database integrated.
